statements.sql: select "posts".*, (select count(*) from "likes" where "posts"."id" = "likes"."post_id") as "likes_count", (select count(*) from "comments" where "posts"."id" = "comments"."post_id") as "comments_count" from "posts" order by "created_at" desc limit 10
